title: visnaga major
intro: Visnaga major, also known as Ammi visnaga, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region and Middle East, characterized by its delicate white flowers and feathery foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which contain furanocoumarins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Visnaga major include its potential anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Visnaga major can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or oil, and is also used in traditional Middle Eastern medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and diuretic properties.
